card_sort_protocol: User picks top 5 cards from a randomized 20-card deck by drag-and-drop. Behavioral anchor is shown on hover/tap. ~3 minutes. Used during onboarding session 1 (current self), session 2 (aspirational), session 3 (admired other). Same deck, three framings.
design_intent: 5 values per MVP-1 domain (truth-telling, resource-allocation, in-group-out-group, reciprocity-cooperation). Within each domain, intentional internal tensions so card-sort and pairwise data carry signal. Each value carries a one-sentence behavioral anchor with implicit cost rather than a pure virtue-word abstraction.

values.label: Honesty
values.behavioral_anchor: Saying what's true, even when it's costly for me or uncomfortable for others.

values.label: Tact
values.behavioral_anchor: Saying true things in a way that protects others' dignity.

values.label: Transparency
values.behavioral_anchor: Not hiding from people things they have a right to know.

values.label: Discretion
values.behavioral_anchor: Knowing what doesn't need to be said.

values.label: Authenticity
values.behavioral_anchor: Keeping consistency between what I feel inside and what I show outside.

values.label: Generosity
values.behavioral_anchor: Giving from my own resources, unprompted, when I can.

values.label: Fairness
values.behavioral_anchor: Distributing resources by clear, defensible principle rather than mood or favor.

values.label: Need-sensitivity
values.behavioral_anchor: Letting genuine need, not who-earned-it, guide where resources go.

values.label: Reciprocity
values.behavioral_anchor: People get back from me what they put in.

values.label: Self-reliance
values.behavioral_anchor: Carrying my own weight; not asking others to absorb my costs.

values.label: Loyalty
values.behavioral_anchor: Standing with the people closest to me, especially when it costs me.

values.label: Universalism
values.behavioral_anchor: Treating strangers the way I'd want to be treated; no extra weight to my own.

values.label: Particularism
values.behavioral_anchor: Recognizing that close relationships carry special weight in what I owe.

values.label: Hospitality
values.behavioral_anchor: Welcoming outsiders into care, even when no one expects it of me.

values.label: Clear circle
values.behavioral_anchor: Knowing who I'm responsible to, and not letting that line slide.

values.label: Trust
values.behavioral_anchor: Extending the benefit of the doubt before I have to.

values.label: Vigilance
values.behavioral_anchor: Not letting myself be taken advantage of, especially repeatedly.

values.label: Cooperation
values.behavioral_anchor: Working with others toward shared ends, even when it slows me down.

values.label: Independence
values.behavioral_anchor: Acting on my own judgment; not waiting for permission or consensus.

values.label: Forgiveness
values.behavioral_anchor: Re-opening cooperation after someone has let me down.
